creator: spear@protect-ya-neck.com
text:
Hi,

Actually i am the maintainer of games/ifm port and i am also the one
who submitted the patch. I just wanted to change my email address from
spear@protect-ya-neck.com to
andy.kosela@gmail.com

On Sat, 19 May 2007 11:10:09 UT, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of games/ifm,
>
> Please note that PR ports/112783 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/112783
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>
